name: Punjab Zakat: hospital finder
summary: Adds a private, instant search across the Punjab Zakat department's public list of eligible hospitals.

operations.title: Find an eligible hospital
operations.description: Search the public and private hospital directory by hospital name without sending your search anywhere.
operations.placeholder: Try Jinnah, children, cardiac, or cancer

changelog: Initial release: bounded local hospital search, accessible result counts, slash-to-focus, and Escape-to-clear across the public eligibility directory.
